hero_subtitle: SFTY consolidates wallet risk signals and transaction monitoring outputs from multiple providers into one structured compliance workflow for clearer risk visibility and audit readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with fragmented risk signals scattered across multiple KYT providers. This disconnection slows down transaction monitoring and weakens the ability to consolidate wallet risk for actionable compliance decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates multi-provider KYT risk outputs, links wallet and transaction data to compliance cases, and structures unified workflows enabling VASPs to efficiently manage on-chain risk with clear audit evidence.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals from multiple providers then routes them into reviews, cases, decisions and preserved evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One risk evidence layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY aggregates and connects multi-provider KYT risk signals into structured cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence to streamline transaction monitoring workflows for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY equips VASP compliance teams with enterprise-grade workflows that unify transaction risk data, preserve audit evidence and support robust bank due diligence controls.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYT compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer that connects wallet, transaction and provider risk signals into one operational workflow for KYT monitoring and case management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY aggregate multi-provider risk scores?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates risk scores from multiple providers, linking wallet and transaction alerts to customers and counterparties, enabling consistent risk review and streamlined case creation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve transaction monitoring evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by storing case histories, decision logs and linked provider outputs to support traceability and review of transaction monitoring outcomes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works with existing KYT and blockchain analytics providers by connecting their outputs into structured risk workflows without changing current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or blockchain analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or analytics tools but complements them by turning their outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and audit evidence.
final_title: Connect multi-provider KYT scores into workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals into structured cases and audit-ready compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
